title: Top At-Risk Students
description: List the 10 students with the highest risk scores across all courses.
question: Show the top 10 students by risk_score, with their name, course, attendance_pct, avg_marks.
followUp: What common factors do these students share?

title: Overbooked Classrooms
description: Find rooms where utilization > 90% this week.
question: List rooms, dates, and time slots where utilization_pct > 90 for the next 7 days.
followUp: Which rooms could be used as alternatives?

title: Placement Skill Gaps
description: Identify placement-ready students with low communication scores.
question: List students from all branches with readiness_index > 70 but communication_score < 50, show their name, branch, and scores.
followUp: Recommend a communication workshop for these students.
Show trend of communication scores over semesters.

title: Low Attendance in CS
description: Find CS students with attendance below 60%.
question: List CS students with attendance_pct < 60, show name, semester, attendance_pct, and risk_score.

title: Placement Readiness Summary
description: Get a summary of placement readiness across branches.
question: For each branch, show the number of students and average readiness_index.
followUp: Which branch needs the most improvement?
Compare this year with last year.
